opportunities.rationale: Dollar Tree crashed ~22% on Feb 26 on Q4 miss and multi-year store restructuring guidance, based above the $101 crash low. Post-earnings trading through late March shows DLTR consolidating in the 103-109 range: closes around 104-106, intraday lows near 103-104 in the week of Mar 23-27, and ~$105.79 on Mar 30. Stop at $98 not hit (QG3 pass). TP at $122 not hit (QG4 pass). Stagflation regime drives consumers to trade down to discount retail. R:R from $105.5 midpoint to $122 vs $98 ~1:2.2. Invalidation: daily close below $98.

data_sources: FT.com and StockAnalysis GLD historical prices Mar 18-31 2026
TwelveData GLD daily OHLC late March 2026 (low $399.20 on Mar 24)
CBOE VIX data and Fed FOMC March 18 statement
opportunities.rationale: GLD sold off from high-470s/low-480s to ~$413 on Mar 18 as gold corrected on USD strength and hawkish FOMC hold (~12.7% drawdown). Subsequent trading Mar 20-31 shows GLD stabilising: lowest low was $399.20 on Mar 24, recovery to close ~$428.65 on Mar 31. Stop at $395 not hit (QG3 pass). TP at $465 not hit (QG4 pass). TP raised from $455 to $465 to restore R:R: from $422 midpoint to $465 vs $395 ~1:1.6 (QG10 pass). War/stagflation safe-haven appeal intact. Size capped at 1% risk given unconfirmed full stabilisation. Condition: hold above GLD $415 for 2 consecutive daily closes before adding. Invalidation: daily close below $395.
